steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=x^3+15$. To find $f(2)$, replace every $x$ with $2$: $$f(2)=2^3+15.$$

steps.title: Apply the exponent first
steps.content: $2^3=8$, so $$f(2)=8+15=23.$$ Do not read $x^3$ as $3x$; that mistake would give $21$ instead.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The computed value is $23$, which matches C. The nearby answers are traps from arithmetic or exponent mistakes, not alternate valid function values.
